assessment_objectives.objective: legally-binding contracts are executed to enforce cybersecurity / data privacy requirements by third-parties.
before sharing sensitive / regulated data, Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) are executed with third parties.
security requirements to be satisfied by external system service providers are defined.
the providers of external system services used for the processing, storage, or transmission of sensitive / regulated data comply with organization-defined security requirements.
the providers of external system services used for the processing, storage, or transmission of CUI comply with the following security requirements: <A.03.16.03.ODP[01]: security requirements>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters:
SDP values: 
(1) For cloud service providers:
  (i) FedRAMP Authorized at the FedRAMP Moderate (or higher) baseline in accordance with the FedRAMP Marketplace; or
  (ii) meets security requirements established by the government equivalent to the FedRAMP Moderate (or higher) baseline.
(2) All other external service providers must meet NIST SP 800-171 R2.
